example_prompt: Handle premium SMS subscription and unsubscription notifications from Africa's Talking.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number that subscribed or unsubscribed.

shortCode.description: The short code with the product the subscriber acted on.

keyword.description: The keyword of the product the subscriber acted on.

gotchas: updateType is either addition (new subscriber) or deletion (unsubscribe). Maintain your own subscriber list and update it accordingly on each notification — Africa's Talking does not expose a subscriber list API.
